sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_18a6a596_b0a0_423b_96af_c497306c9dca" (

    "name" TEXT,

    CONSTRAINT "fk_18a6a596b0a0423b_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
